requirements.title: Replace Figures 1--3 with paper-ready method diagrams
requirements.evidence: Figures 1--3 are regenerated as deterministic vector/PDF route assets. The imagegen bitmap was not used because these figures contain exact formulas and labels; the package instead uses reproducible PDF/PNG assets generated from source code.
requirements.next_action: After official-template migration, inspect figure width and text readability under the selected AAAI style.

requirements.title: Compress framework narrative into a reproducible algorithm
requirements.evidence: main.tex defines Algorithm 1, normalized certificate terms, validation-only threshold grids, and frozen deployment tuple.
requirements.next_action: Keep the implementation manifest synchronized with any future hyperparameter-grid changes.

requirements.title: Distinguish reliability admission from attention/gate/pruning/calibration
requirements.evidence: The method section and matched gate-control table explicitly separate risk-controlled admission from ordinary gates, attention, selective prediction, calibration, and pruning.
requirements.next_action: When new experiment results are available, add exact seed-level numbers for every matched gate-control row.

requirements.title: Turn experiments from result display into auditable protocols
requirements.evidence: Protocol tables and the execution manifest specify splits, windows, metrics, seeds, thresholding policy, and no-test-tuning constraints.
requirements.next_action: Attach raw seed-level prediction and metric JSON files when completing external baseline alignment.

requirements.title: Strengthen temporal, graph-temporal, and reliability/gating baselines
requirements.evidence: All listed baseline obligations are materialized under matched protocol. Official-source adapted controls are present for PatchTST, Anomaly Transformer, Graph WaveNet and remain official_external_score=false.
requirements.next_action: Keep public leaderboard wording disabled unless exact native benchmark reproductions are later added.

requirements.title: Provide systematic internal ablation coverage
requirements.evidence: The manuscript/manifest enumerate the required variants, and aaai_ablation_coverage_audit is complete with no missing rows.
requirements.next_action: Keep aaai_ablation_coverage_audit synchronized whenever a reliability term or ablation artifact changes.

requirements.title: Complete measured efficiency experiments
requirements.evidence: Efficiency audit is complete with three-seed measured parameter, training-time, and inference-throughput rows for SKAB, C-MAPSS, and TEP sequence controls.
requirements.next_action: Regenerate aaai_efficiency_audit after adding or changing any formal timed run.

requirements.title: Deliver paired English AAAI LaTeX and Chinese manuscript artifacts
requirements.evidence: English AAAI LaTeX/PDF artifacts and the Chinese UTF-8 reading draft are both materialized, and the final paper package lists them as paired deliverables.
requirements.next_action: Regenerate the Chinese draft and final package summary after any paper-story change.

requirements.title: Prove official/leaderboard SOTA under exact native protocols
requirements.evidence: Exact-native protocol gate blocks official SOTA wording for: TEP, SKAB, Hydraulic, C-MAPSS. Matched-protocol claims remain allowed. Gate status is official_sota_not_admissible.
requirements.next_action: Run exact native split/preprocessing/metric/budget/baseline reproductions before using public leaderboard or universal official SOTA claims.

requirements.title: Preserve cautious causal-infeasible claim boundary
requirements.evidence: The paper frames counterfactual perturbation as model-dependence evidence and avoids true-causal-graph or public leaderboard overclaims.
requirements.next_action: Keep forbidden draft phrases out of every exported submission artifact.

requirements.title: Migrate the portable draft into an official AAAI author kit
requirements.evidence: Official AAAI style/class file detected, source compiled cleanly, and rendered float inspection gate passed. Template gate status: ready_for_official_migration. Compile gate status: compiled_clean. Float gate status: inspected_clean.
requirements.next_action: Keep the official template files synchronized with any final source edits.

requirements.title: Reach final AAAI-level submission readiness
requirements.evidence: The work is not treated as final while template migration or required external baseline alignment remains unresolved.
requirements.next_action: Complete every partial or blocked gate, then re-run this audit and the LaTeX build.

remaining_blockers: Prove official/leaderboard SOTA under exact native protocols: Run exact native split/preprocessing/metric/budget/baseline reproductions before using public leaderboard or universal official SOTA claims.
